Use a pre-order DFS traversal to serialize. Represent null nodes with a placeholder like 'N'.
Separate values with a delimiter like comma so they can be easily split during deserialization.
During deserialization, split the string, maintain a pointer/index, and recursively rebuild: the current value is the node, recurse left, then recurse right.
A BFS-based (level-order) approach also works cleanly for this problem.
